tools_used: CourtListener MCP search and endpoint retrieval
helpful: The complete BIO directly tested whether the petition's questions were actually implicated.
The committed statpack supplied paid-petition, Tenth Circuit, relist, and CVSG calibration anchors.
CourtListener MCP exposed narrow post-Barnes circuit context without querying the petition's disposition.
gaps: The corpus-prior remote was unreachable because DNS resolution failed.
The provisioned petition extraction was truncated within the district-court appendix, although the merits petition and appellate opinion were available.
notes: The corpus query failed before any ranged-read statistics or prior rows were produced. The forecast therefore relied on the provisioned record, committed aggregate base rates, and CourtListener doctrine research.
